name: intervals-icu-jan
description: intervals.icu MCP server — 134 tools across 17 domains. Lean profile (default) exposes 28 high-value tools (~11k tokens) including the get_activity_full_report aggregator; set INTERVALS_PROFILE=full for the full surface (~44k tokens). Forked from mvilanova/intervals-mcp-server.
long_description:
Model Context Protocol server exposing the intervals.icu REST API for personal use. Covers activities (CRUD, analytics, search), events (calendar CRUD + bulk ops), wellness (read + locked-aware writes), workout templates, sport settings, gear + reminders, athlete profile + training plan, weather, routes, file operations (FIT/GPX/ZWO/MRC/ERG/TCX uploads + downloads), and a cross-domain aggregator (`get_activity_full_report`) that fetches 8 endpoints in parallel and returns one consolidated markdown report. Two profiles: `lean` (default — 28 tools, ~11k tokens of tool schema, sized for Claude Desktop) and `full` (134 tools, ~44k tokens, full SDK coverage). Each write tool is gated by `permissions.ask` in Claude Code; wellness writes default `locked: true` to survive Oura/Garmin sync.

**Prerequisite**: this extension runs the Python server via `uv` (Astral's fast Python package manager). Install `uv` once, then this DXT bundle works without any further toolchain setup. macOS/Linux: `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh`. Windows: `powershell -c "irm https://astral.sh/uv/install.ps1 | iex"`. Python 3.12+ is required; `uv` will auto-resolve and provision it on first run.

api_key.title: intervals.icu API key
api_key.description: Generate at intervals.icu → Settings → Developer Settings.

athlete_id.title: intervals.icu Athlete ID
athlete_id.description: Your numeric athlete ID, e.g. i12345 — visible in your profile URL.

profile.title: Tool profile (type 'lean' or 'full')
profile.description: Type EXACTLY one of two values:  •  lean (recommended) — 28 high-value tools, ~11k tokens of schema. Sized for Claude Desktop without dominating the context window. Includes the get_activity_full_report aggregator + create_manual_activity + download_workout (Zwift export).  •  full — all 134 tools, ~44k tokens of schema. SDK-style coverage. Use only if you need long-tail endpoints (gear management, sport-settings tweaks, custom dashboard items, OAuth disconnect, FIT bundle downloads, etc.). Anything other than the literal string 'full' falls back to lean — typo-resistant.
